mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, labor market slack signals weakening aggregate demand and corporate earnings deterioration, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in greater than 65% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer spending and construction activity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns as earnings expectations rise.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 20-day returns with a statistically significant coefficient in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect expanding manufacturing capacity utilization, which translates to immediate positive S&P 500 returns over the next week during economic expansion phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases yield negative 5-day forward returns in greater than 55% of observations during confirmed expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: Growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases household income and consumer spending capacity, systematically driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rolling 3-year Rank IC between PAYEMS growth and 60-day forward returns remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 240.0, accelerating inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy and margin compression, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of months where CPIAUCSL remains above 240.0.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based economic expansion, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter as corporate profits materialize.
failure_condition: The interaction term between GDPC1 and RSAFS growth shows no predictive power for 60-day returns with a coefficient insignificant at 95% confidence.

mechanism_narrative: Declines in the unemployment rate during recessionary periods signal economic stabilization and policy effectiveness, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: UNRATE declines during recessionary periods are followed by negative 5-day returns in greater than 50% of cases.
